question.ask: ets_th2 How long will the woman stay in Beijing?</br>(For half a month. / For a month. / For two months.)

info.value: M: Why are you so happy?</br>W: Because I'm going to Beijing. I will work as a volunteer to help the old people there.</br>M: That's great! I was a volunteer three years ago.</br>W: Really? Where did you volunteer?</br>M: In Sichuan. We helped the homeless people there.</br>W: How long did you stay there?</br>M: For half a month. By the way, how long will you stay in Beijing?</br>W: For two months.
